1 - Lagging: Software delivery stalls frequently; support tickets pile up without resolution; deployment cycles exceed 3+ weeks; team context-switches constantly between development and urgent field failures.
2 - Developing: Moderate throughput on feature releases; some support tickets addressed but response time inconsistent (5-10 days); predictability challenged by unexpected hardware failures requiring dev team involvement; quality issues in driver releases cause field regressions.
3 - Proficient: Consistent delivery of features and support resolution; development cycles average 2-3 weeks; support tickets resolved within 48-72 hours; hardware integration quality stable; team balances proactive development with reactive support demands effectively.
4 - Exemplary: High velocity across both domains; feature releases every 1-2 weeks with zero regressions in hardware integration; support tickets resolved within 24 hours; cross-platform driver reliability exceeds 99.5%; deployment predictability enables business roadmap confidence.

1 - Lagging: Delivery timelines unpredictable; firmware/driver releases frequently slip; support ticket resolution times vary wildly (same issue takes 2 days one week, 2 weeks the next); hardware lab availability undefined.
2 - Developing: Most delivery commitments met but occasional slips; hardware testing cycles somewhat predictable but prone to environmental issues; stakeholders have rough visibility into kiosk uptime improvements; field deployment timing unclear until last minute.
3 - Proficient: Delivery forecasts reliable; hardware deployment windows consistent; support response SLAs met 90%+ of time; stakeholders can plan around team capacity; firmware release cycles predictable and scheduled proactively.
4 - Exemplary: Delivery forecasting highly accurate; support SLA compliance at 99%+; hardware deployment schedules optimized to business needs; stakeholders trust team timelines; crisis response time for deployed kiosk failures < 2 hours.

1 - Lagging: Drivers contain critical bugs; hardware integration layer unstable causing frequent field failures; kiosk downtime >5% monthly; serial communication/USB protocol issues unresolved; support team overwhelmed by recurring issues.

3 - Proficient: Drivers stable and well-tested before deployment; hardware abstraction layer supports multiple device types reliably; kiosk uptime >98%; field failures rare and quickly resolved; serialization/USB protocol handling robust; support team addressing new issues, not firefighting.
4 - Exemplary: Driver quality production-grade; hardware integration layer abstraction enables rapid new device onboarding; kiosk uptime >99.5%; zero recurring field issues; comprehensive driver test coverage; cash acceptance and fingerprint scanner APIs perform flawlessly.

3 - Proficient: Real-time ticket visibility for field teams; deployment windows communicated 2+ weeks ahead; hardware changes communicated proactively; ClickUp dashboard accessible to stakeholders; weekly communication cadence.
4 - Exemplary: Automated stakeholder updates on ticket progress; deployment schedule published quarterly; hardware changes communicated with impact analysis; stakeholder ClickUp access optimized; daily briefing for critical issues.

1 - Lagging: Support response >5 hours for critical issues; ticket updates delayed; field teams wait for status; escalation slow; response time unpredictable.
2 - Developing: Support response 2-4 hours typical; ticket updates mostly timely; field team waits sometimes; escalation improving; response time getting faster.
3 - Proficient: Support response <2 hours for critical issues; ticket updates within 4 hours; field teams updated proactively; escalation swift; response time consistent.
4 - Exemplary: Support response <1 hour for critical deployed failures; real-time ticket updates; field teams proactively informed; escalation automatic; response time <30 minutes average.

4 - Exemplary: Support team drives development priorities; lessons learned captured in real-time; field insights analyzed for trends; weekly knowledge share sessions; development roadmap informed by support intelligence.
